name: Innovative Payment Solutions, Inc.
business: Innovative Payment Solutions, Inc. is a fintech provider of digital payment solutions, including credit card processing and e-wallet services, targeting underserved markets. The company operates through joint ventures, with initial focus on the gaming and entertainment sectors. It has not yet generated any revenue from its current business model.

exposures.sentence: We are a provider of digital payment solutions and services to businesses and consumers.

tamClaims.claim: Total global remittance payments estimated to reach over $913 billion in 2025, digital payments 30% ($273.5 billion).
tamClaims.sentence: According to publicly available data from Statista, total global remittance payments are estimated to reach over $913 billion in 2025, of which digital payments are estimated to reach approximately 30% ($273.5 billion) of total remittances.
